features: Achieve Salon-Quality Results with Sanguine's Ultra-Sharp Japanese Hairdressing Scissors - No More Split Ends Guaranteed.
Get Healthier Hair Growth with Our Convex Blade Hairdressing Scissors - No More Snapping, Only Cutting.
Effortlessly Cut All Hair Types with our Hairdressing Scissors - Suitable for Wet and Dry Hair, Ideal for Slicing Techniques and Beards/Moustaches

Sharp and Long-lasting: Our professional hairdressing scissors are hand-sharpened using premium Japanese steel (J2), ensuring a sharp, precise cut every time. With proper care, they'll retain their sharpness longer than ordinary scissors. No screwdriver or key required, the adjustable tension screw can be adjusted by hand with ease.

Complete with a Color-Coordinated Presentation Case, these Scissors Weigh 45-50 g and Feature a Black Finish. The Adjustable Screw System and Finger Rest Bar Ensure Comfort and Customization for Every Cut.
description: Product Description Sanguine Hair Scissors Sanguine JAG-Series Black with matching presentation case One Scissors for all Hair Type Work flawlessly on all hair types (straight, wavy, curly, coily, beard or moustache trimming). Suitable for Professionals as well as for personal use. Please do not cut anything other than hair with these scissors. Suitable for all Hair Cutting need For Barbers and Hairdressers Whether you are a Hairdresser or a Barber these Japanese style hair scissors are exceedingly sharp and will not damage or cause split hair ends. Hence, it will help your customers to grow undamaged hair. Personal Use These are great scissors for personal use because their agronomical design makes it easier for amateur to use. These scissors will give clean cut every time and will not damage your hair ends. Works flawlessly on Beards Great hair scissors for beard or moustache trimming. These scissors instead of pulling hair, cuts them without damaging them. Presentation Case Matching presentation case for safe keeping.
